🦅 동생 작성 지시문 기반 — 커서 자동 생성

# 3군 패치 D(snake DB 가중치) 후 전량 백테스트 보고서

## STEP 3 — 성능 분석

### 3-A 구간별 전체 뇌 통합 (`v12_%`, draw 6~1221)

```sql
SELECT period, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(matched_count) AS avg_mc, MAX(matched_count) AS max_mc
FROM (
  SELECT target_draw_no, matched_count,
    CASE
      WHEN target_draw_no BETWEEN 6 AND 400 THEN 'A(6-400)'
      WHEN target_draw_no BETWEEN 401 AND 800 THEN 'B(401-800)'
      WHEN target_draw_no BETWEEN 801 AND 1221 THEN 'C(801-1221)'
      ELSE 'other'
    END AS period
  FROM lotto_predictions_army3
  WHERE brain_tag LIKE 'v12_%' AND matched_count >= 0
    AND target_draw_no BETWEEN 6 AND 1221
) t
WHERE period != 'other'
GROUP BY period ORDER BY period
```

```text
A(6-400)	15775	1.3805388272583201	6
B(401-800)	16000	1.454875	6
C(801-1221)	16840	1.4160332541567695	6
```

**이전 snake 구간 참고(구 가중치 백테)**: A avg≈1.8947 max5 hit4+87 · B avg≈1.997 max5 hit4+127 · C avg≈1.9055 max4 hit4+90

### 3-B `v12_snake` 구간별 (패치 D 후)

```sql
SELECT period, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(matched_count) AS avg_mc, MAX(matched_count) AS max_mc,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matched_count >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hit4plus
FROM (
  SELECT target_draw_no, matched_count,
    CASE
      WHEN target_draw_no BETWEEN 6 AND 400 THEN 'A(6-400)'
      WHEN target_draw_no BETWEEN 401 AND 800 THEN 'B(401-800)'
      WHEN target_draw_no BETWEEN 801 AND 1221 THEN 'C(801-1221)'
      ELSE 'other'
    END AS period
  FROM lotto_predictions_army3
  WHERE brain_tag = 'v12_snake' AND matched_count >= 0
    AND target_draw_no BETWEEN 6 AND 1221
) t
WHERE period != 'other'
GROUP BY period ORDER BY period
```

```text
A(6-400)	1975	2.152911392405063	5	204
B(401-800)	2000	2.2145	5	187
C(801-1221)	2105	2.1961995249406177	5	136
```

### 3-C 뇌별 성능 (`v12_%`, draw 1~1221)

```sql
SELECT brain_tag,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(matched_count) AS avg_mc,
  MAX(matched_count) AS max_mc,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matched_count >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hit4plus,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matched_count >= 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hit5plus,
  SUM(CASE WHEN matched_count >= 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hit6
FROM lotto_predictions_army3
WHERE brain_tag LIKE 'v12_%' AND matched_count >= 0
  AND target_draw_no BETWEEN 1 AND 1221
GROUP BY brain_tag
ORDER BY brain_tag
```

```text
v12_contrarian	6080	0.7817434210526316	4	6	0	0
v12_fusion	6080	1.9773026315789475	6	577	102	5
v12_hyena	6080	2.206578947368421	6	662	48	1
v12_lstm	6055	1.7971924029727497	6	278	21	2
v12_offset	6080	0.7930921052631579	5	9	1	0
v12_run	6080	0.7889802631578947	4	9	0	0
v12_snake	6080	2.1881578947368423	5	527	35	0
v12_stat	6080	0.8069078947368421	5	7	1	0
```

### 3-E `matched_count = 6` 상세

```sql
SELECT target_draw_no, brain_tag, num1, num2, num3, num4, num5, num6, method
FROM lotto_predictions_army3
WHERE matched_count = 6 AND brain_tag LIKE 'v12_%'
ORDER BY target_draw_no, brain_tag
```
